items.title: Study the pattern
items.body:
Workbook lesson 7: To want / To go. Read the sentences, listen, and repeat.

Examples:
• Lesson 7
• I want. I go.
• I want to go with you. I want to go the movies.
• I want to speak only English. I want to go to the park.

items.prompt: To want – querer. To go – ir

items.text: I want to go with you. I want to go the movies.

items.prompt: Eu quero ir com você.. Eu quero ir ao cinema.
options: You want to go with you. I want to go the movies.
I want to go with you. I want to go the movies.
I want to go with you. I want to go the movies 3.
movies the go to want I you with go to want I.

items.answer: I want to speak only English. I want to go to the park.
I want to play soccer. I want to go to school.
